name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lower the bar under control to mid-chest, then press upward.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Press the dumbbells from chest level until the arms are extended.

name: Incline Bench Press
instructions: Press from the upper chest while keeping shoulder blades retracted.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Press dumbbells upward on a low-incline bench.

name: Chest Press Machine
instructions: Press the handles forward without locking the elbows.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Bring the handles together in a wide hugging motion.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lower the dumbbells in an arc, then squeeze them together.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Keep a rigid body line and lower the chest toward the floor.

name: Decline Push-Up
instructions: Elevate the feet and perform a controlled push-up.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Bring the pads together and pause at peak contraction.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Pull the chest toward the bar without swinging.

name: Assisted Pull-Up
instructions: Use assistance to complete a smooth full-range pull-up.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Pull the bar toward the upper chest while keeping the torso stable.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Row the handle to the torso and squeeze the shoulder blades.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips and row the bar toward the lower ribs.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Brace the torso and pull the dumbbell toward the hip.

name: Chest-Supported Row
instructions: Keep the chest supported and row with elbows back.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Row the handle toward the chest with a neutral spine.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Keep arms nearly straight and pull the bar to the thighs.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Pull the rope toward the face with elbows high.

name: Barbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Brace the core and press the bar overhead.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead without arching the lower back.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Rotate the palms outward while pressing overhead.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height with soft elbows.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise the handle sideways under constant cable tension.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Raise the weight forward to shoulder height.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge forward and sweep the arms outward.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
instructions: Open the arms backward while keeping the chest against the pad.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull the bar upward with elbows leading comfortably.

name: Shrug
instructions: Elevate the shoulders straight upward and pause.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Curl the bar without moving the upper arms.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl each dumbbell with the elbows at the sides.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Curl with palms facing each other throughout.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl from arms extended on an incline bench.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Keep upper arms on the pad and curl smoothly.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Curl the handle while keeping elbows stationary.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Brace the elbow against the thigh and curl.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Curl the EZ bar with controlled wrist position.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: Extend the elbows fully while keeping upper arms still.

name: Rope Pushdown
instructions: Push the rope down and separate the ends.

name: Overhead Triceps Extension
instructions: Lower behind the head and extend the elbows overhead.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Bend only the elbows to lower the bar, then extend.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Bench press with a shoulder-width grip and tucked elbows.

name: Triceps Dip
instructions: Lower under control with an upright torso, then press up.

name: Triceps Kickback
instructions: Hold the upper arm still and extend the elbow behind you.

name: Band Triceps Pushdown
instructions: Anchor the band high and extend the elbows downward.

name: Back Squat
instructions: Squat with a braced torso and knees tracking over toes.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Keep elbows high and squat while maintaining an upright torso.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold the weight at the chest and squat deeply.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Lower the platform under control and press through the feet.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Extend the knees and squeeze the quadriceps.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward and lower both knees with control.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Step backward and lower until the front thigh approaches parallel.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Elevate the rear foot and squat through the front leg.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Lower deeply against the pad and drive through the platform.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Step onto a stable box and stand through the working leg.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at the hips and lower the bar close to the legs.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Brace, push the floor away, and stand with the bar.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Curl the pad by bending the knees and control the return.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Curl the lower pad down while staying against the backrest.

name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge on one leg while extending the other behind you.

name: Good Morning
instructions: With a braced spine, hinge forward at the hips.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Lower the torso slowly while the ankles remain anchored.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Drive the kettlebell forward with a powerful hip extension.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Drive the hips upward and finish with the ribs down.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Press through the heels and lift the hips.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Extend one hip backward without rotating the pelvis.

name: Frog Pump
instructions: Press the soles together and lift the hips repeatedly.

name: Band Hip Abduction
instructions: Press the knees outward against the band.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Use a wide stance and stand by driving through the floor.

name: Curtsy Lunge
instructions: Step diagonally behind and lower with control.

name: Smith Machine Hip Thrust
instructions: Drive the fixed bar upward through full hip extension.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Rise onto the toes, pause, and lower through a full stretch.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Raise the heels while keeping the knees bent.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Rise on one foot through a complete range of motion.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
instructions: With hips hinged, raise the heels as high as possible.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
instructions: Press the platform using only ankle movement.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Use small rhythmic jumps and land softly.

name: Farmer Walk on Toes
instructions: Walk steadily while keeping the heels elevated.

name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
instructions: Raise and lower the heels under the fixed bar.

name: Plank
instructions: Maintain a straight line while bracing the abdomen.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Support the body on one forearm and keep hips elevated.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Raise the legs without swinging and control the descent.

name: Lying Leg Raise
instructions: Raise straight legs while keeping the lower back controlled.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Curl the ribs toward the pelvis against cable resistance.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Alternate elbow toward opposite knee with control.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Rotate the torso side to side while staying braced.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Extend opposite arm and leg while the back stays flat.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Roll forward only as far as you can maintain a braced spine.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Drive alternating knees forward from a strong plank.

name: Burpee
instructions: Move from standing to plank and return with a controlled jump.

name: Dumbbell Clean and Press
instructions: Clean the dumbbells to the shoulders, then press overhead.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
instructions: Drive from a squat directly into an overhead press.

name: Farmer Carry
instructions: Walk tall while holding heavy weights at the sides.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Rise from the floor while keeping the weight stacked overhead.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions: Crawl with knees hovering and hips level.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Drive the sled forward with short powerful steps.

name: Man Maker
instructions: Combine a push-up, rows, clean, squat, and press smoothly.

name: Treadmill Running
instructions: Run at a sustainable pace with relaxed posture.

name: Outdoor Running
instructions: Run with even effort and comfortable stride.

name: Stationary Cycling
instructions: Pedal smoothly at the selected resistance.

name: Outdoor Cycling
instructions: Cycle safely with a steady cadence.

name: Walking
instructions: Walk briskly with an upright relaxed posture.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with the legs, lean back slightly, then pull the handle.

name: Elliptical
instructions: Use smooth strides while maintaining an upright torso.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Climb steadily without leaning heavily on the rails.

name: Swimming
instructions: Swim with controlled breathing and efficient technique.

name: Cricket
instructions: Record active match or practice time and distance if available.

name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions: Alternate gently between spinal flexion and extension.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Tuck the pelvis and shift forward from a half-kneeling position.

name: 90/90 Hip Switch
instructions: Rotate both knees side to side while seated.

name: Thoracic Rotation
instructions: Rotate the upper back while keeping the hips stable.

name: Band Shoulder Pass-Through
instructions: Move a wide grip overhead and behind within a comfortable range.

name: Ankle Mobility Rocks
instructions: Drive the knee forward over the toes while the heel stays down.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Lunge deeply, place a hand down, and rotate the other arm upward.

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Sit hips toward heels and reach the arms forward.
